extracted_information: Detailed pricing information for various automation testing tools has been extracted. Pricing models include free tiers, monthly/annual subscriptions, one-time purchases, and custom pricing based on usage or enterprise needs. Specific pricing tiers and associated notes like 'billed annually' or 'per month' are provided where available.

pricing.Selenium: No direct pricing as it's an open-source framework, mentioned as supported by other tools like LambdaTest and Cucumber.
pricing.QA Wolf: Connect with sales team for pricing.

LambdaTest.Additional_Notes: Includes 100 free automation minutes upon signing up.
